{
    "name":  "pl_pbnafc_edr_dlh4",
    "properties":  {
                       "activities":  [
                                          {
                                              "name":  "Wait_For_API_Propagation",
                                              "description":  "Wait 5 seconds for ADF API to register near-simultaneous run starts before querying",
                                              "type":  "Wait",

                                              "description":  "Query ADF REST API to check if same pipeline has competing runs in last 10 minutes",
                                              "type":  "WebActivity",
                                              "dependsOn":  [
                                                                {
                                                                    "activity":  "Wait_For_API_Propagation",
                                                                    "dependencyConditions":  [
                                                                                                 "Succeeded"
                                                                                             ]
                                                                }
                                                            ],
                                              "policy":  {
                                                             "timeout":  "0.00:02:00",
                                                             "retry":  2,
                                                             "retryIntervalInSeconds":  30,
                                                             "secureOutput":  false,
                                                             "secureInput":  false
                                                         },
                                              "userProperties":  [

                                                                 ],
                                              "typeProperties":  {
                                                                     "method":  "POST",
                                                                     "headers":  {
                                                                                     "Content-Type":  "application/json"
                                                                                 },
                                                                     "url":  {
                                                                                 "value":  "@concat(\u0027https://management.azure.com/subscriptions/\u0027, pipeline().globalParameters.p_subscription_id, \u0027/resourceGroups/\u0027, pipeline().globalParameters.p_resource_group, \u0027/providers/Microsoft.DataFactory/factories/\u0027, pipeline().DataFactory, \u0027/queryPipelineRuns?api-version=2018-06-01\u0027)",
                                                                                 "type":  "Expression"

"items":  {
                                                                                   "value":  "@activity(\u0027Check_Recent_Pipeline_Runs\u0027).output.value",
                                                                                   "type":  "Expression"
                                                                               },
                                                                     "condition":  {
                                                                                       "value":  "@and(not(equals(item().runId, pipeline().RunId)), or(less(item().runStart, pipeline().TriggerTime), and(lessOrEquals(item().runStart, pipeline().TriggerTime), less(item().runId, pipeline().RunId))))",
                                                                                       "type":  "Expression"
                                                                                   }
                                                                 }
                                          },

                                                                                 "value":  "@concat(\u0027https://management.azure.com/subscriptions/\u0027, pipeline().globalParameters.p_subscription_id, \u0027/resourceGroups/\u0027, pipeline().globalParameters.p_resource_group, \u0027/providers/Microsoft.DataFactory/factories/\u0027, pipeline().DataFactory, \u0027/queryPipelineRuns?api-version=2018-06-01\u0027)",

{
                                                                                                  "name":  "Set_Run_Message_Executed",
                                                                                                  "description":  "Pipeline executed because no competing run was found",
                                                                                                  "type":  "SetVariable",
                                                                                                  "dependsOn":  [
                                                                                                                    {

                                                                                                                                                 ]
                                                                                                                    }
                                                                                                                ],
                                                                                                  "policy":  {

                                                                                                                 "secureInput":  false

                                                                                                  "userProperties":  [

                                                                                                                     ],
                                                                                                  "typeProperties":  {
                                                                                                                         "variableName":  "pipelineReturnValue",

                                                                                                                                       {
                                                                                                                                           "key":  "v_run_message",
                                                                                                                                           "value":  {
                                                                                                                                                         "type":  "Expression",
                                                                                                                                                         "content":  "@if(equals(activity(\u0027Publish Event Grid Topic\u0027).Status, \u0027Succeeded\u0027), concat(\u0027SUCCESS: Pipeline=\u0027, pipeline().Pipeline, \u0027 RunId=\u0027, pipeline().RunId, \u0027 executed. No competing run found since \u0027, addMinutes(pipeline().TriggerTime, -10), \u0027.
